title: tovaria scilloides
intro: Tovaria scilloides, also known as the desert squill or desert squill-toadflax, is a perennial plant species in the family Hyacinthaceae, characterized by its star-shaped flowers and broad, flat leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tovaria scilloides include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Tovaria scilloides can be made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and powdering the plant for use in capsules or tinctures.
